headline: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Home Depot, ServiceNow, Alphabet, Agilysys, Sandisk, and More
summary: Home Depot  rose 1.2% after the home-improvement retailer posted first-quarter earnings that beat analysts’ estimates and revenue rose 4.8% to $41.8 billion, with comparable sales up 0.6%.  ServiceNow  gained 4% and was set to build on its 9% jump in the previous session after Bank of America reinstated coverage of the software company with a Buy rating and a $130 price target.  Agilysys  jumped more than 15% after the hospitality software provider beat earnings and revenue estimates in its fiscal fourth quarter.

headline: Stock Index Futures Slip as Tech Selloff Continues, Iran in Focus
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are down -0.38%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are down -0.65% this morning, pressured by a retreat in technology stocks, while investors await signs of progress toward a peace deal in the Middle East.

headline: Akamai AI Brand Presence Optimizes Content and Raises Visibility in Agentic Search
summary: Akamai AI Brand Presence Image of the Akamai AI Brand Presence dashboard showing how users can understand which AI models are visiting a site and what content they are consuming. The dashboard also demonstrates how those AI interactions turn into real traffic and customer engagement. Optimizing brand content for AI search and agentic trafficAs its own first customer, Akamai increased citations by 85% and brand presence by 364%AI bot traffic grew more than 300% year over year CAMBRIDGE, Mass., Ma
